articles.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
articles.description: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

articles.title: US cybersecurity agency CISA had to build its incident playbook during the incident, agency reveals
articles.description: Independent cybersecurity journalist Brian Krebs reported in May that a security researcher with cyber firm GitGuardian alerted him to reams of exposed passwords stored in a publicly accessible GitHub repository, which an employee of a CISA contractor had uploaded.

articles.title: Phia accused of ‘cookie stuffing,’ taking affiliate credit on purchases it didn’t earn
articles.description: Phia, the shopping startup founded by Bill Gates’ daughter, Phoebe, and her friend Sophia Kianni is under fire for a practice known as “cookie stuffing,” which helped the product receive commissions and credit for sales it did not actually generate, per a Bloomberg investigation.

articles.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
articles.description: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."

articles.title: Bluesky’s interim CEO, Toni Schneider, drops the ‘interim’
articles.description: Schneider, who formerly served as the CEO of Automattic and is a partner at True Ventures, says he is "all in" on the unconventional social media platform.

articles.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
articles.description: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

articles.title: Filing: College app Fizz accuses VC of sharing confidential startup information with rival Sidechat
articles.description: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup.

articles.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
articles.description: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

articles.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
articles.description: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

articles.title: China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets
articles.description: China's state-owned space company recovered its first orbital rocket booster after launch.

articles.title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says
articles.description: The launch of free content would allow Disney+ to better compete with free services like YouTube and Tubi, which are capturing a growing share of consumers’ viewing time.

articles.title: Dumb Co dared me to trade my iPhone for a hacked flip phone
articles.description: Dumb Co sells flip phones that sync to your smartphone, bridging the infinite connectivity of the iPhone and the unrealistic limitations of an early 2000s relic.

articles.title: Oratomic raises $300M to build a viable quantum computer that needs only 20K qubits
articles.description: The massive round was co-led by ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures.

articles.title: Netflix could be planning ‘always-on’ live TV channels
articles.description: Amid signs of slowing engagement, Netflix is reportedly considering launching "always-on" live channels, giving subscribers something to tune into 24/7.

articles.title: EU threatens Meta with fines over addictive features on Facebook and Instagram
articles.description: The tech giant is in breach of the Digital Services Act by focusing on features like infinite scroll, autoplay, push notifications, and the highly personalized recommendation algorithms, the European Commission said.

articles.title: Florida ransomware negotiator convicted for helping ransomware gang extort US companies
articles.description: A third ransomware negotiator has been jailed for helping a notorious ransomware group extort American victim companies into paying the hackers.

articles.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
articles.description: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

articles.title: After Apple, India’s smartphone manufacturing boom enters new phase with Vivo JV
articles.description: Vivo's joint venture could become a template for Chinese smartphone makers in India.

articles.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
articles.description: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

articles.title: Don’t want to invest in Elon Musk? Two new ETFs explicitly exclude him
articles.description: The new exchange-traded funds exclude companies that are founded, controlled, or led by Elon Musk. That means no SpaceX or Tesla.

articles.title: A Jupiter-size planet that escaped its star's death
articles.description: It's unclear how the planet avoided its star's bloated red giant stage.

articles.title: Overhaul of public lands grazing regulations seeks to cut public involvement
articles.description: For the first time since 1995, the Bureau of Land Management is rewriting its grazing regulations.

articles.title: Quantum error correction can constantly recalibrate a processor
articles.description: Reinforcement learning uses error information to adjust control algorithms.

articles.title: Increased drone surveillance of illegal July 4th fireworks led to $100K fine
articles.description: More police and firefighters use drones to catch and deter illegal fireworks.

articles.title: China recovered its first reusable rocket and showed a new way to do it
articles.description: "Clearly, they admire the work that's being done by SpaceX and are trying to replicate it."

articles.title: Check out the first images of Quest shipwreck
articles.description: The Quest shipwreck is in worse shape than expected, but it has turned into a thriving marine ecosystem.

articles.title: Ransomware negotiator hired to represent victims was working for the attackers
articles.description: Six years in prison for man who "sold out the very victims he was hired to represent."

articles.title: Study shows how toxic RFK Jr.’s change to measles vaccine is for US toddlers
articles.description: The children who get a combination shot are some of the most vulnerable.

articles.title: Valve's new Steam Machine verification system is silent on these Steam Deck-busters
articles.description: Dozens of titles too taxing for Steam Deck are still unrated for the new hardware.

articles.title: Firmware update bricks Hue Bridge Pro devices; Philips gives free replacements
articles.description: Affected users will have to configure their lights and settings all over again.

articles.title: An orbiting disco ball gave Einstein’s theory its most precise test yet
articles.description: The Earth may not be that massive, but it still distorts space-time.

articles.title: Disable autoplay and infinite scroll or risk massive fines, EU tells Meta
articles.description: Digital Services Act may force Meta to make big changes on its platforms.

articles.title: NASA sure seems to be asking an awful lot of private space stations
articles.description: "Industry finally knows what NASA is asking of them."

articles.title: Volkswagen Group tells its board how to fix it, unions disagree
articles.description: VW's plan calls for half as many models but didn't mention closures or job cuts.

articles.title: Wally Funk, last of Mercury 13 and oldest woman in space, dies at 87
articles.description: "I have been waiting a long time to finally get up there..."

articles.title: Is an air-conditioning revolution coming to Europe?
articles.description: The AC culture wars may be solved by advances in environmentally friendly technology.

articles.title: Rocket Report: "Panic" over Transporter availability; Isar to launch from Canada
articles.description: "We are delighted to actively help shape the ramp-up of the Ariane 6."

articles.title: Like a cheat code for your car: We investigate ECU tuning
articles.description: Now it's an arms race between OEMs locking down chips and tuners trying to crack them.

articles.title: Flores Hobbits' eating habits offer clues about their evolutionary past
articles.description: If Homo floresiensis wasn't a fire-using hunter, its origins could be different than we thought.

articles.title: Michigan's explosive outbreak of diarrheal parasite jumps to over 1,200 cases
articles.description: In neighboring Ohio, cases have reportedly reached over 500.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **OpenAI拓展家庭场景**：OpenAI正推动ChatGPT深入家庭，瞄准家庭用户市场，意图扩大AI在日常生活中的应用。
2. **美国网络安全机构CISA自曝应急短板**：CISA承认在应对网络安全事件时，不得不临时构建事件响应手册，暴露了其预案准备不足的问题。
3. **Meta与欧盟监管冲突加剧**：欧盟威胁对Meta处以罚款，因其Facebook和Instagram上的“成瘾性”功能；同时Meta在争议后移除Instagram上的AI功能。
4. **SK海力士创美国史上最大外资IPO**：SK海力士融资265亿美元，并被敦促在美国建设新工厂，显示半导体产业本土化趋势加速。
5. **中国可重复使用火箭追赶SpaceX**：报道指出中国在可重复使用火箭技术方面正快速追赶马斯克的SpaceX，航天竞争格局生变。

今日最值得关注的发展：SK海力士以265亿美元创下美国史上最大外资IPO，凸显全球半导体供应链重组与芯片本土化制造的迫切性。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **PyTorch性能分析与Attention机制**：Hugging Face发布系列文章，深入探讨PyTorch性能分析（第三部分），强调Attention机制在模型剖析中的核心作用。
2. **Hugging Face平台与云服务集成**：多项更新实现一键部署至Amazon SageMaker Studio、Foundry托管计算，并通过SkyPilot实现零出口存储跨云运行AI工作负载。
3. **模型与代理功能扩展**：Hugging Face推出LeRobot v0.6.0（想象-评估-改进循环）、PRX数据策略第四部分以及核心内核重大更新；Google Gemini API扩展托管代理功能（后台任务、远程MCP）。
4. **OpenAI与微软Copilot重大升级**：GPT-5.6成为Microsoft 365 Copilot首选模型，同时被定位为“前沿智能，随你雄心扩展”，ChatGPT被重新定义为“最雄心勃勃工作的合作伙伴”；此外，OpenAI还宣布GPT-5.5生物漏洞赏金计划。
5. **行业应用案例**：Deutsche Telekom披露如何利用AI重塑电信运营（OpenAI博客），展示生成式AI在大型企业中的实际落地。

**最值得关注**：GPT-5.6正式成为微软Copilot核心模型，标志着OpenAI与微软的深度整合进入新阶段，同时Hugging Face在跨云部署与代理技术上密集更新，AI基础设施与模型能力同步加速迭代。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中国首次成功回收可重复使用火箭**：中国在轨道发射中首次实现火箭第一级回收，标志着航天技术取得历史性突破，为未来降低发射成本、提升太空竞争力奠定基础。  
2. **中国AI模型推动全球软实力提升**：中国开源AI模型在技术应用和国际影响力上持续进步，成为增强国家软实力的重要力量。  
3. **中国批准希音（Shein）赴港IPO**：希音第三次申请赴港上市终获中国监管批准，显示中国对跨境电商企业资本运作的支持。  
4. **中俄“无限制”合作涉星链**：报道称中俄在太空领域形成“无限制”伙伴关系，包括对星链系统的潜在反制行动，引发国际关注。  
5. **中国公共二维码遭犯罪团伙篡改**：不法分子将中国公共场所二维码重定向至色情网站，形成“扫码诈骗”新形式，需加强网络安全监管。

**总结：今日最值得关注的发展是中国首次实现轨道级火箭回收，这一里程碑式突破不仅缩小了与SpaceX的技术差距，更将加速中国商业航天生态的成熟与全球竞争力提升。**
